info.title: SDP - CMDB (v1 legacy)
info.description: Legacy XML CMDB API for ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus On-Premises builds below 15100 (where the CMDB v3 JSON API is unavailable). Lists/counts configuration items and reads/writes CI relationships. Auth: the technician key as the 'TECHNICIAN_KEY' query parameter (same secret value as the V3 'authtoken'). Write payloads are XML supplied in the 'INPUT_DATA' form field. Responses are JSON with the envelope { API: { response: { operation: { result, Details } } } }; success is result.statuscode 200. Definition (import-by-URL): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PBNZ/sdp-on-prem-powerplatform/main/connectors/sdp-cmdb-v1/apiDefinition.swagger.json

get.description: Lists all configuration items (legacy V1 CMDB API).
Returns the total count of configuration items (legacy V1 CMDB API).

Gets all relationships of a configuration item by CI name (case-sensitive). To filter by relationship type or find the relationship between two CIs, use the sub-path forms documented in the connector README.

post.description: Adds or deletes CI relationships. The operation (add or delete) is expressed in the XML payload supplied in INPUT_DATA. Add example: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><API version="1.0" locale="en"><records><relationships><addrelationship><toci>CI-A</toci><relationshiptype>Depends on</relationshiptype><relatedcis><citype>Windows Server</citype><ci><name>CI-B</name></ci></relatedcis></addrelationship></relationships></records></API>. Delete uses <deleterelationship><fromci>..</fromci>..</deleterelationship>.

parameters.name: INPUT_DATA
parameters.description: The relationship operation as an XML document (see the operation description and the connector README for add/delete templates).
